zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Douglas of Lothian於1303年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯 卡素時，他的父親Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston17歲，母親Joan Lovel16歲。他於1337年與Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年1月25日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯享年47歲，埋葬在澳洲維斯特 奧斯特拉利亞未知 易曼德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Douglas of Lothian于1303年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯 卡素时，他的父亲Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston17岁，母亲Joan Lovel16岁。他于1337年与Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1350年1月25日在苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯享年47岁，埋葬在澳大利亚維斯特 奧斯特拉利亞未知 易曼德。

en.Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland: Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Douglas of Lothian was born in 1303, in Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston, was 17 and his mother, Joan Lovel, was 16. He married Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith in 1337, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 January 1350, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 47, and was buried in Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Douglas of Lothian est né en 1303, à Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan Lovel, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith en 1337, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1350, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Douglas of Lothian 1303 in Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston 17 und seine Mutter Joan Lovel 16. Er hat 1337 in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1350 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australien begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Douglas of Lothianが1303年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラス カストルで生まれた時，父Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermistonは17歳，母Joan Lovelは16歳であった。1337年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスでAgnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年1月25日にスコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスで47歳で死去し，オーストラリアウエステルン アウストラリアウンクノウン イスランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Douglas of Lothian(이)가 1303년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Lovel(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1337년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 1월 25일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트레일리아 웨스터 오스트라리야 노운 이슬랜드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith em 1337, em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ro.Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland: Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Douglas of Lothian родился в 1303 г. в местности доуглас кастл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Lovel, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith в 1337 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 января 1350 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности унноун исланд, вестирн аустраля, Австралия.

Se casó con Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith en 1337, en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1350, en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.
